umich.notes: lsa.umich.edu returns 403/ECONNREFUSED from proxy. URLs tried: lsa.umich.edu/cg/, ro.umich.edu/catalogs, atlas.ai.umich.edu, bulletin.umich.edu

duke.notes: SSL blocked from proxy environment. registrar.duke.edu/academics/courses-curricula-catalogs/ returns 404.

jhu.notes: Scraped via e-catalogue.jhu.edu/course-descriptions/. 10248 courses (14.67% progressive, 4.88% canon).

upenn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped (11,142 deduplicated courses). Historical 2000-2025 not collected.

ucla.notes: catalog.registrar.ucla.edu uses Next.js/CourseLoop (api-us-west-1.prod.courseloop.com). CourseLoop API returns 403 Forbidden; CF URL (cf-api-us-west-1.prod.courseloop.com) connection refused (000). SPA fully client-rendered; no public course data API accessible from proxy environment.

uw.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. UW old-style HTML (anchor-name pattern).

osu.notes: catalog.osu.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

cmu.notes: Scraped via SOC Servlet (title-only, no descriptions). F24/S25 not accessible; 2026-27 available. 8,167 courses.

usc.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

brown.notes: Scraped via bulletin.brown.edu/. 11480 courses (27.98% progressive, 9.6% canon).

dartmouth.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via SmartCatalogIQ JSON nav + individual course pages (ThreadPoolExecutor 8 workers).

rice.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 105 subjects via Banner SWKSCAT course catalog. div.course with h3+Long Title+Description format.

georgetown.notes: Scraped from sitearchives.georgetown.edu. Live site SSL-blocked. Full descriptions available 2004-2016 AY (catalog years 2005-2017). 41,409 courses.

emory.source: catalog.college.emory.edu (static HTML, Emory College of Arts & Sciences)
emory.notes: 2025-26 catalog scraped. catalog.college.emory.edu is static HTML (48 departments, 3607 courses). catalog.emory.edu uses Coursedog/dynamic JS but College catalog is accessible. Historical years only as PDFs.

washu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via bulletin.wustl.edu dept pages (CourseleafCMS). 100 dept paths across undergrad/grad schools.

ucsd.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 84 departments. Static HTML per-dept pages. p.course-name 'DEPT NUM. Title (Credits)' + p.course-descriptions format.

ucdavis.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 237 departments. CourseleafCMS detail-code/detail-title span format. Graduate level >= 200. Em-dash prefix in title spans.

ucsb.source: app.coursedog.com CSV export API (public, no auth required)
ucsb.notes: 2025-26 catalog scraped via Coursedog public CSV export API. 14,121 courses. No grad_threshold for level (UCSB: <200=undergrad).

uci.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 124 departments. CourseleafCMS detail-code/detail-title span format. UCI multi-word dept codes (AC ENG, ART HIS). Graduate level >= 200.

msu.notes: catalog.msu.edu and schedule.msu.edu return ProxyError (SSL blocked from proxy environment).

purdue.notes: Scraped via Banner SIS (262 subjects, Fall terms 2008-2026, AY 2009-2027). catalog.purdue.edu uses Acalog (202 JS-only); Banner SIS endpoint accessible with parallel requests (10 workers). Full descriptions available. Progressive signal rose from 8.6% (2009) to 14.7% (2026), then 14.0% (2027). 292,677 total courses.

iu.source: bulletin.college.indiana.edu (College of Arts and Sciences AJAX API)
iu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 70 subjects from College of Arts and Sciences. AJAX endpoint /ajax/bulletin_ajax.php with action BULLETIN-COURSES-RESULTS. Paginated by subject.

umn.source: app.coursedog.com CSV export API (public, no auth required)
umn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via Coursedog public CSV export API. school=umn_umntc_peoplesoft. 25,682 courses (deduplicated from 52,862 rows). grad_threshold=5000.

uva.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

tufts.notes: Bulletin only available as Box.com PDF (students.tufts.edu/registrar/forms-and-policies/bulletin). catalog.tufts.edu and coursecatalog.tufts.edu both return 000 (proxy blocked). tufts.smartcatalogiq.com returns 500. No accessible structured course data endpoint.

cwru.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 223 departments via bulletin.case.edu (full catalog — Engineering, Arts & Sciences, Medicine, Law, Management). Previous 'partial_accessible' assessment was outdated; all schools accessible. 0 depts failed.

rochester.notes: catalog.rochester.edu, courses.rochester.edu, bulletin.rochester.edu all return 000 (proxy blocked). rochester.smartcatalogiq.com is accessible but returns 'Document Not Found' for all year paths — catalog appears to have been migrated or removed.

wfu.notes: 78 dept pages from bulletin.wfu.edu/azindex/. 3 pages failed (proxy disconnect). CourseleafCMS format.

uga.notes: Custom .NET bulletin system with POST API. 248 subjects, 18 per page, paginated. Deduplicated cross-listed courses.

fsu.notes: Coursedog CSV (fsu_peoplesoft, kNmTRiTxAoRs2wXOK2cs). CSV lacks course codes/numbers. 86 draft entries skipped.

uarizona.source: app.coursedog.com CSV export API (public, no auth required)
uarizona.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via Coursedog public CSV export API. school=arizona_peoplesoft. 38,659 courses (deduplicated from 50,404 rows). grad_threshold=500.

asu.notes: catalog.apps.asu.edu is a React SPA (class search). API at eadvs-cscc-catalog-api.apps.asu.edu/catalog-microservices/api/v1/search/courses requires OAuth authentication (returns 401 Unauthorized). catalog.asu.edu is a Drupal site with program listings only — no individual course descriptions accessible without auth.

utah.notes: Coursedog CSV export (utah_peoplesoft). Only subject code + catalog number exported — no title or description. Keyword analysis not possible.

vt.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 142 departments at catalog.vt.edu/course-descriptions/{dept}/. CourseleafCMS detail-code/detail-title format. Previously logged as Acalog but catalog has migrated to CourseleafCMS. Session warmup required (visit main page first).

pitt.notes: 168 subject codes from filter[27] select; preview_course.php per coid via ThreadPoolExecutor(8). No WAF on catalog.upp.pitt.edu.

rutgers.notes: Scraped via SoC JSON API (title-only, no descriptions). API returns data only for 2024-2027. 33,114 courses across NB, NK, CM campuses.

temple.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 248 departments. Previously logged as SSL-blocked but bulletin.temple.edu accessible. CourseleafCMS p.courseblocktitle + div.courseblockdesc format.

rpi.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine (catoid=18, navoid=444, ts=20200213142349). 1297 courses, 66 with archived descriptions (preview pages mostly not crawled by Wayback).

utk.note: Scraped from Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages (catoid=1, navoid=104, pages 1-13)

uky.notes: catalog.uky.edu returns ProxyError (SSL blocked from proxy environment).

ua.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 107 course pages via /azindex/. Custom div.cb_subj/cb_numb/cb_title/cb_desc structure.

auburn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Previously blocked; bulletin.auburn.edu/coursesofinstruction/ now accessible. 162 departments. Custom courseblock format: div.courseblock > p > strong 'DEPT NNNN TITLE (N)' + description.

lsu.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

ou.notes: catalog.ou.edu redirects to http://www.ou.edu/enrollment/academic_publications (HTTP redirect). Proxy supports HTTPS-only tunnels; HTTP redirect target returns 404 via HTTPS. registrar.ou.edu returns 000 (proxy blocked). Coursedog not found for ou.edu.

clemson.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine (catoid=16, navoid=485, ts=20221129103811). 194 courses from pages 1-2, no descriptions (preview pages not archived). Direct access SSL-blocked by proxy.

unl.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Re-scraped with cb_ span format parser (undergrad + grad-professional). 9954 unique courses.

ku.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 17 college pages. CourseleafCMS with span.detail-code/detail-title/courseblockextra format.

kstate.notes: Previously blocked_by_network; catalog.k-state.edu uses Coursedog. CSV export via public API. 20,938 unique courses.

msstate.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Custom em>strong title format 'DEPT NUM  Title:  N hours.'

wvu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Previously blocked; catalog.wvu.edu now accessible. 5341 undergrad + 4851 grad unique courses. CourseleafCMS all-courses-on-one-page format.

unm.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped via Banner SIS (255 subjects, Fall 2026 term 202680). catalog.unm.edu is dynamic JS; Banner SIS endpoint is static HTML.

unlv.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

baylor.notes: Scraped UG+Grad course catalog from catalog.baylor.edu. 215 department pages.

ttu.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

uh.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine (catoid=1, navoid=52, ts=20210418035350). 1600 courses from pages 1-5, no descriptions available (preview pages not archived).

louisville.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 108 undergrad + 101 grad depts. CourseleafCMS p.courseblocktitle format. Previously logged as Acalog but catalog has migrated to CourseleafCMS.

uc.notes: catalog.uc.edu uses Acalog/ACMS returning 202 with JS-only content.

miami.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 281 departments via courses-az/ AZ index.

stonybrook.notes: catalog.stonybrook.edu uses Acalog/ACMS (returns 202 for content pages).

udel.note: Scraped via Wayback Machine archived Acalog pages

uta.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 139 departments. Standard CourseleafCMS period format. 14 depts failed.

gmu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 169 departments. CourseleafCMS variant: strong.cb_code + em.cb_title.

idaho.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 135 departments. CourseleafCMS noindent variant. 1 dept failed.

utd.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 80 grad + 107 undergrad depts. Bukku system: p#{dept}{num} with span.course_address/title/hours.

utsa.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 126 undergrad + 87 grad depts. CourseleafCMS period format.

montanastate.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 176 depts. CourseleafCMS. 4 depts failed.

odu.notes: ODU uses div.cols.noindent with span.detail-xrefcode, span.detail-title format.

txstate.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 124 depts via /azindex/. CourseleafCMS format. 1 dept failed.

uncg.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 115 depts. CourseleafCMS noindent variant.

calpoly.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 128 depts. Custom multi-line strong format. 3 depts failed.

utahtech.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. CourseleafCMS period format. 2 depts failed (biol, chem).

uvu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 148 depts. ODU-style div.cols.noindent format. 3 depts failed.

uaf.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 134 depts. Custom format: dept+num+title+credits concatenated in courseblocktitle.

umt.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 150 depts. CourseleafCMS dash format: DEPT NUM - Title. N Credits.

ysu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 154 depts. CourseleafCMS: DEPT NUM    Title    N s.h. format.

uwec.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 165 depts. CourseleafCMS: DEPT NUM Title (N crs) + p.courseblockdescription. 2 depts failed.

atu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 255 depts. CourseleafCMS span.detail-code + span.detail-title format. 1 dept failed.

unk.notes: UNK uses /undergraduate/ and /graduate/ URL patterns. Em dash separator in titles.

uwm.notes: UWM uses button.courseblocktitle format (not p), standard CourseleafCMS otherwise.

neiu.notes: NEIU uses dash-format codes (ACTG-201). Standard CourseleafCMS.

uidaho.notes: U Idaho: noindent format with optional (s) qualifier. Standard CourseleafCMS.

vsu.notes: Virginia State U, uses undergrad+grad paths, period-separator format.

worcester.notes: Worcester State U, full-name slug URLs, dash-format course codes (BI-101).

une.notes: U New England, div.cols.noindent format with div.courseblockextra desc.

uni.notes: U Northern Iowa: period separator with em-dash before credit hours.

iit.notes: Illinois Institute of Technology. div.courseblocktitle format (div not p).

fairfield.notes: Fairfield University. div.cols.noindent with span.detail-code/detail-title format.

wsu.notes: catalog.wsu.edu uses Blazor WebAssembly (.NET) - dynamic JS SPA, not scrapable.

oit.notes: Coursedog CSV export (oit_banner). Descriptions not in export template — keyword analysis based on course titles only.

alverno.notes: Alverno College. Dash-format codes (A-100 Title). CourseleafCMS noindent variant.

vanguard.notes: Vanguard University. detail-code/detail-title span format. Dash-format codes (ACCT-P225).

biola.notes: Biola University. p.courseblocktitle with DEPT NBSP NUM - Title Credits N format.

unco.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. 88 undergrad + 65 grad depts. SmartCatalogIQ h2-based course format.

coloradomesa.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. CourseleafCMS period format. 6 depts failed.

cornerstone.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. CourseleafCMS format. 5 depts failed.

csp.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Concordia-St. Paul. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

csub.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Cal State Bakersfield. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

keene.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Keene State College. CourseleafCMS format. 3 depts failed.

lamar.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Lamar University. CourseleafCMS format. 5 depts failed.

mwcc.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Mount Wachusett Community College. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

ncsu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. NC State. detail-coursecode/detail-title span format. 0 depts failed.

ndsu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. NDSU. CourseleafCMS period format. 7 depts failed.

shsu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Sam Houston State. CourseleafCMS period format. 5 depts failed.

snow.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Snow College. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

tamiu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Texas A&M International. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

uab.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. UAB. CourseleafCMS period format. 6 depts failed.

uwgb.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. UW Green Bay. CourseleafCMS full-name dept codes. 18 depts failed.

uwplatt.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. UW Platteville. Credits in span format. 16 depts failed.

washburn.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Washburn University. CourseleafCMS format. 0 depts failed.

tamucc.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Texas A&M Corpus Christi. detail-code span format. 0 depts failed.

wku.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Western Kentucky University. CourseleafCMS tab-separated title format. 0 depts failed.

marshall.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Marshall University. detail-code span with code+num+title in one element. 0 depts failed.

tsu.notes: 2026-27 catalog scraped. Texas Southern University. detail-code/detail-title span format. 0 depts failed.

cu.notes: CourseleafCMS per-department pages at /courses-a-z/{dept}/. 177 departments scraped.

reference_rescrape_2026.note: berkeley/harvard/yale/princeton/uchicago/columbia/vanderbilt = dynamic-JS or proxy-blocked; utaustin/tamu = catalog soft-404. These 9 retain Marinovic (2026) published values.

original_100_summary.notes: 84/100 universities scraped (10 added via Wayback Machine this session: utk, lsu, unlv, usc, uva, ttu, udel, rpi, uh, clemson). Remaining blocked by proxy (SSL/network): umich, duke, msu, tufts, bc, brandeis, rochester, sc, uky, olemiss (10). Still inaccessible (dynamic JS / WAF with no Wayback archives): osu, ou, uc, asu, stonybrook, wsu (6). CDX search confirmed 0 entries for uky, sc, olemiss, bc, brandeis, rochester. MSU, duke, tufts, umich CDX queries returned SSL errors (could not determine). UCLA is also blocked (CourseLoop API 403). Total inaccessible: 17 universities.
